developers.name: Emin Gun Sirer
developers.activity: Multiple GitHub commits weekly to avalanchego. Academic papers on consensus. Active Twitter.

narrativeAtSnapshot: Avalanche mainnet launched September 2020. EVM-compatible L1 with sub-second finality. May 2021 crypto market crash brought AVAX from ~$50+ down to ~$10-11 — presenting a structural entry point. Avalanche Rush incentive program ($180M to attract DeFi protocols) not yet announced but under development. Developer activity accelerating despite price crash — elite team continuing builds. Mention growth: ~2x week-over-week in EVM developer communities, primarily among ETH developers frustrated with gas costs. No mainstream financial press coverage post-crash. Structural signal: 3 elite developers with strong academic credentials (Cornell), $230M venture raise from Polychain and others, EVM compatibility lowering migration barrier for ETH dApps. Trader Joe and Pangolin DEX early traction.
